overview.description: Stats Perform (formerly Opta) provides sports data APIs, push feeds, editorial content, video, and betting stats across all major global sports. APIs require authentication. Two main data delivery methods: REST API (sdapi) and Push/Streaming (opta-push).

sports_data_api.description: REST API for sports data. Request-response model. Supports polling. Feed codes follow patterns: OT (tournament), TM (team), MA (match), PE (person/player). Coverage varies by tier.
